positioning: A practical content operations system that proves draft-to-MP4 quality locally before publishing integrations are added.

sceneStyles.hook: fast title resolve, accent rail, early proof cue
sceneStyles.explain: steady copy reveal with progress bar
sceneStyles.proof: structured point card with status marker
sceneStyles.close: calm final slate with direct next action

audio.placeholder: Generated sine-tone guide track so MP4s are playable before final narration.
audio.mixNotes: Final publish audio should replace tones with voiceover and keep music below speech.

captions.style: concise sidecar SRT plus large in-video text

designIntent: Make builders moving from prototype automation to a repeatable content system understand Define the smallest pipeline that creates reviewable drafts and playable videos.
